purpose: Narrow pilot over the hard30 YouTube Shorts fragrance fixture to test whether transcript-only product-talk posture adds useful signal beyond rhetorical mode.
scope: Product-talk posture labels from transcript text only; no audio energy/prosody, visuals, comments, likes, or creator-level generalization.

placement_decision.repo_role: transitional pilot mirror/receipt only; not canonical durable row storage

candidate_lake_homes.quote_backed_product_mentions_and_source: derived/<transcript-packet>/silver__cleaning__product_mentions/<id> or a sibling Cleaning silver lane under the same raw anchor when the row is not itself a product mention
candidate_lake_homes.posture_and_claim_frame_features: future derived lane only after a stable row contract and source-pointer admission

placement_decision.do_not_promote_as_is: pilot rows do not all carry CE2/CE9 quote/timestamp pointers and include provisional qualitative labels
placement_decision.boundary: silver may carry traceable transcript-visible features; it must not carry buyer proof, credibility, sponsorship truth, or independent preference/source-value conclusions

labeler.independence_posture: not independent; same-lane qualitative pilot labels
labeler.transcript_body_storage: no transcript bodies copied into this repo artifact

field_contract.stable_status: pilot only; not a closed benchmark rubric
field_contract.claim_frames: multi-label provisional vocabulary for product promise / objection frames visible in transcript text

rows.author: Jeremy Fragrance
rows.title: UNIQUE BLUE, By SUPERZ: #jeremyfragrance #fragrance #cologne #perfume #parfum
rows.evidence_note: brief scent-of-day mention gives one positive descriptor but little product argument

rows.author: Gents Scents
rows.title: Ultra Male For Ultra Cheap - Lattafa Ramz Silver
rows.evidence_note: budget clone is praised for scent/value while bottle and atomizer are criticized

rows.author: Gents Scents
rows.title: Top 10 Spring Designer Fragrances For Men 2023
rows.evidence_note: top-ten list implies endorsement but gives almost no per-product rationale

rows.author: Gents Scents
rows.title: The Best Blue Fragrances For The Classy Modern Man
rows.evidence_note: blue-fragrance list repeatedly frames products as classy, versatile, higher-quality, or strong performers

rows.author: The Perfume Guy
rows.title: $88 for the BEST La Vie Est Belle Flanker?! 😍
rows.evidence_note: flanker is strongly praised as a discounted, dense, long-lasting fragrance worth trying or owning

rows.author: The Perfume Guy
rows.title: The Best Fruity Oud You’re Not Wearing!
rows.evidence_note: Montal fragrance is framed as a favorite discounted buy with easy wear, strength, and compliment appeal

rows.author: The Perfume Guy
rows.title: $25 Men’s Fragrance That Smells Like Luxury | Bentley for Men Intense 👑
rows.evidence_note: budget fragrance receives long-term personal-use proof and direct try recommendation

rows.author: School of Scent
rows.title: The Best Summer Fragrance For Each Age Group
rows.evidence_note: age-group recommendations use performance, value, maturity, and luxury cues as product reasons

rows.author: School of Scent
rows.title: The Highest Rated Summer Fragrances At Each Price Range
rows.evidence_note: price-range review repeatedly says the picks deserve hype and emphasizes projection, longevity, and luxury quality

rows.author: School of Scent
rows.title: This Fragrance Or SHL God Of Fire? - Mykonos Perfume Top 3 Buying Guide
rows.evidence_note: brand-sent products are ranked as better-value replications and end with discount/stock language

rows.author: Curly Scents
rows.title: Top 10 Best Spring Perfumes for WOMEN.
rows.evidence_note: list frames perfumes as social-attention and status picks, with limited product-level evidence

rows.author: Curly Scents
rows.title: TOP 10 SEXIEST SPRING FRAGRANCES FOR MEN!
rows.evidence_note: list sells the products through sexiness/taste identity rather than detailed scent evaluation

rows.author: Funmi Monet
rows.title: #DovePartner The best smelling skin on the block starts with @dove Serum+ Oil Body Wash
rows.evidence_note: sponsored body-wash line is positioned as an affordable perfume-routine base with clear grab-one/all-three CTA

rows.author: Funmi Monet
rows.title: Notes Shanghai 2025 #notesshanghai #perfume #notesshanghai2025 #fragrance
rows.evidence_note: event story records positive discovery language for several brands without asking the audience to buy

rows.author: Soki London
rows.title: Which Is The Best Version Of The New CK Euphoria Elixir Perfumes...? | Soki London
rows.evidence_note: three CK variants are compared with mild likes, similarity notes, and fading caveats

rows.author: Soki London
rows.title: @EmiBudhabhai Tries The Soki London Ophelia Travel Spray 🌸❤️
rows.evidence_note: Ophelia is praised as fresh, fruity, long-lasting, summery, and beautiful, but creator/brand relationship is contextually ambiguous

rows.author: TLTG Reviews
rows.title: Spectrum Chill is definitely one of THE BEST Clone Releases of 2026
rows.evidence_note: scent-of-day segment strongly endorses the release as cheap, strong, and one of the best clone releases

rows.author: TLTG Reviews
rows.title: The Fragrance to Celebrate a Successful Show
rows.evidence_note: personal update includes a strong favorite-product endorsement with beach/vacation framing and social-proof language

rows.author: TLTG Reviews
rows.title: Lattafa Khamrah Waha can be worn in ANY SEASON!
rows.evidence_note: product is recommended for people who like the line, while the speaker explicitly stops short of calling it exceptional

rows.author: Redolessence
rows.title: Rasasi Hawas Reina Perfume Review!
rows.evidence_note: new collaboration fragrance is praised as elegant, sensual, long-lasting, and suitable for night-out or everyday use

rows.author: Redolessence
rows.title: Stallion 53 Donna Intense Perfume Review!
rows.evidence_note: product is pitched as the cheapest inspiration, compliment-pulling, convenient, and worth clicking through to inspect

rows.author: Redolessence
rows.title: House of Dastan Love Flame Perfume Review!
rows.evidence_note: Love Flame is framed as sensual, elegant, romantic, well-composed, and unusually long-lasting

rows.author: The Fragrance Apprentice
rows.title: 5th September 2026 will be the end of the Fragrance Apprentice
rows.evidence_note: channel-update transcript references future reviews but does not evaluate a product

rows.author: The Fragrance Apprentice
rows.title: I STILL forbid you to buy this fragrance.
rows.evidence_note: fragmentary sketch-style transcript still carries an explicit forbidding/buying-warning posture

rows.author: The Fragrance Apprentice
rows.title: The Fragrance That Smells of Christmas and Horse Poop
rows.evidence_note: unpleasant descriptor is folded into an ultimately appreciative dark-Christmas sensory narrative

rows.author: Jeremy Fragrance
rows.title: Game Of Spades EMERALD & REFRESH #jeremyfragrance #fragrance #cologne #perfume #parfum
rows.evidence_note: two Game of Spades products are strongly praised with performance and compliment claims plus a check-out-new-release prompt

rows.author: Jeremy Fragrance
rows.title: Game Of Spades EMERALD & REFRESH #jeremyfragrance #fragrance #cologne #perfume #parfum
rows.evidence_note: new release is praised but compared against an existing favorite, making the recommendation positive but qualified

rows.author: Curly Scents
rows.title: The New Carolina Herrera Good Girl Jasmine Absolute 😍 #ad #goodgirlcarolinaherrera #carolinaherrera
rows.evidence_note: short transcript is polished product-copy praise, while ad status is title metadata rather than transcript evidence

rows.author: Funmi Monet
rows.title: NYX Fat Oil Collection #nyxcosmeticspartner
rows.evidence_note: sponsored product line is framed through scent families, routine layering, glow, and all-day scent bubble

rows.author: Soki London
rows.title: Why Am I So Disappointed In The New Khloe Kardashian Perfumes :( | Soki London
rows.evidence_note: review acknowledges smell and price positives but dominant posture is disappointment, boredom, and lack of uniqueness

non_claims: not audio tone, energy, pace, volume, or prosody
not proof that product-talk posture is worth full instrumentation
not a claim that transcript-only labels capture sarcasm or delivery reliably
not canonical durable data-lake row storage
